title: Blue and Gold Faces 2026
description: A face painting initiative during the Big Match season and Rugby Season, enhancing school spirit through on-site face painting at match venues and classroom visits.

title: Plein Air Art Exhibition 2026
description: An art exhibition capturing the beauty of the school environment through live landscape and portrait drawings, featuring an exclusive event open to Old Royalists.

title: Chithra Akura 2026
description: A multi-phase project including an O/L art seminar series, the outdoor creations board, and a dedicated website to educate students about the art syllabus.

title: Legacy 2026
description: An educational field visit program taking students from Grades 8–12 to art galleries and museums including the National Museum, JDA Perera Gallery, Saskia Fernando Gallery, and Lionel Wendt Art Gallery.

title: Fantasy Creations 2026
description: An inter-school sculpture competition featuring a workshop, a sculpting and Lego art competition, and a grand exhibition at Royal Mas Arena.

title: Grafflix 2026
description: A two-phase project featuring a Graphic Designing Workshop at Royal College Union and a Digital Arts Competition open to inter-school and intra-school students.
